headline: Jim Cramer Highlights the Possible Struggles of Lamb Weston Holdings
summary: Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:LW) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer discussed amid the reshuffling of the S&P 500. Cramer highlighted the major decline in the stock over the past couple of years, as he said: Third, Lamb Weston sells frozen potatoes. They dominate that entire business.
